title: Probability & Statistics
subject: Interactive Course
description: A Brilliant-style stats course — averages, correlation, probability, binomial, normal curves, and estimation. Every problem is answerable, with progressive hints and gated solutions.
persona: Alex learns by doing: drag, compute, choose — then read the takeaway.

lessons.title: Chapter 1 — Averages and Variation
lessons.description: Mode, mean, median, weighted mean, spread, z-scores, and the IQR outlier rule.

lessons.title: Chapter 2 — Correlation and Regression
lessons.description: Scatterplots, r, causation traps, slope/intercept, prediction, and r².

lessons.title: Chapter 3 — Elementary Probability
lessons.description: Complements, addition with overlap, independence, trees, and counting.

lessons.title: Chapter 4 — Binomial Distribution
lessons.description: Classify binomial settings, coefficients, mean, SD, and shape.

lessons.title: Chapter 5 — Normal Curves & Sampling
lessons.description: Empirical rule, z-scores, areas, CLT, and sample-mean probabilities.

lessons.title: Chapter 6 — Estimation
lessons.description: Point estimates, confidence intervals, margins of error, and sample size.

lessons.title: Chapter 7 — Hypothesis Testing
lessons.description: Null and alternative hypotheses, test statistics, p-values, and error types.

lessons.title: Chapter 8 — Comparing Two Groups
lessons.description: Paired vs independent designs, differences of means, and difference intervals.

lessons.title: Chapter 9 — Chi-Square Tests
lessons.description: Goodness-of-fit, independence, expected counts, and degrees of freedom.

lessons.title: Chapter 10 — Inference for Regression
lessons.description: Testing the slope, prediction, interpreting coefficients, and r-squared.
